'''鈭歮-th-d''' ('''kamathad''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:erugate|erugate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-th-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:erugate|erugate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歮-th-d
|-
! Lemma
| kamathad
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimathad|thimathad]] || [[word:jimathad|jimathad]] || [[word:shimathad|shimathad]] || [[word:kimathad|kimathad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumathad|thuthumathad]] || [[word:jujumathad|jujumathad]] || [[word:shushumathad|shushumathad]] || [[word:kukumathad|kukumathad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumathad|thumathad]] || [[word:jumathad|jumathad]] || [[word:shumathad|shumathad]] || [[word:kumathad|kumathad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thumathad|thumathad]] || [[word:jumathad|jumathad]] || [[word:shumathad|shumathad]] || [[word:kumathad|kumathad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:themathad|themathad]] || [[word:jemathad|jemathad]] || [[word:shemathad|shemathad]] || [[word:kemathad|kemathad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothomathad|thothomathad]] || [[word:jojomathad|jojomathad]] || [[word:shoshomathad|shoshomathad]] || [[word:kokomathad|kokomathad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomathad|thomathad]] || [[word:jomathad|jomathad]] || [[word:shomathad|shomathad]] || [[word:komathad|komathad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomathad|thomathad]] || [[word:jomathad|jomathad]] || [[word:shomathad|shomathad]] || [[word:komathad|komathad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙mathad|th忙mathad]] || [[word:j忙mathad|j忙mathad]] || [[word:sh忙mathad|sh忙mathad]] || [[word:k忙mathad|k忙mathad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamathad|thathamathad]] || [[word:jajamathad|jajamathad]] || [[word:shashamathad|shashamathad]] || [[word:kakamathad|kakamathad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamathad|thamathad]] || [[word:jamathad|jamathad]] || [[word:shamathad|shamathad]] || [[word:kamathad|kamathad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamathad|thamathad]] || [[word:jamathad|jamathad]] || [[word:shamathad|shamathad]] || [[word:kamathad|kamathad]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shamathad|shamathad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshamathad|goshamathad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishamathad|gokishamathad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shamathadn眉|shamathadn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshamathadnkn眉|goshamathadnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishamathadn眉|gokishamathadn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shamathadsh毛|shamathadsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshamathadnksh毛|goshamathadnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishamathadsh毛|gokishamathadsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamathadro|shamathadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamathadnkro|goshamathadnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamathadro|gokishamathadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shamathadmu|shamathadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamathadnkmu|goshamathadnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamathadmu|gokishamathadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shamathadsher|shamathadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshamathadnksher|goshamathadnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishamathadsher|gokishamathadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shamathadng|shamathadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshamathadnkng|goshamathadnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishamathadng|gokishamathadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shamathadya|shamathadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshamathadnkya|goshamathadnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishamathadya|gokishamathadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shamathadyam|shamathadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshamathadnkyam|goshamathadnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishamathadyam|gokishamathadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamathadn眉sh毛|shamathadn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamathadnkn眉sh毛|goshamathadnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamathadn眉sh毛|gokishamathadn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamathadn眉ro|shamathadn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamathadnkn眉ro|goshamathadnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamathadn眉ro|gokishamathadn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamathadn眉mu|shamathadn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamathadnkn眉mu|goshamathadnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamathadn眉mu|gokishamathadn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamathadsh毛n眉|shamathadsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamathadnksh毛n眉|goshamathadnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamathadsh毛n眉|gokishamathadsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamathadsh毛ro|shamathadsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamathadnksh毛ro|goshamathadnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamathadsh毛ro|gokishamathadsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamathadsh毛mu|shamathadsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamathadnksh毛mu|goshamathadnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamathadsh毛mu|gokishamathadsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamathadron眉|shamathadron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamathadnkron眉|goshamathadnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamathadron眉|gokishamathadron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamathadrosh毛|shamathadrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamathadnkrosh毛|goshamathadnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamathadrosh毛|gokishamathadrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamathadromu|shamathadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamathadnkromu|goshamathadnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamathadromu|gokishamathadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamathadmun眉|shamathadmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamathadnkmun眉|goshamathadnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamathadmun眉|gokishamathadmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamathadmush毛|shamathadmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamathadnkmush毛|goshamathadnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamathadmush毛|gokishamathadmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamathadmuro|shamathadmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamathadnkmuro|goshamathadnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamathadmuro|gokishamathadmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
